title: Yield Research Agent
summary: Monitors yield sources behind a yield-bearing stablecoin — staking core, funding rates, or repayment streams — and emits typed APY/compression verdicts. Research-only, Arbitrum Sepolia.

facts.value: core staking rate, trailing APY, yield source durability

sections.heading: APY
sections.body: Compare current APY vs trailing 7d/30d average; flag yield_compression on sustained decline.

sections.heading: Source
sections.body: Identify whether yield comes from funding, protocol revenue, or collateralized lending repayments.

sections.heading: Catalysts
sections.body: Flag catalyst_positive or catalyst_negative when governance or market events shift yield trajectory.

actions.name: readApy
actions.description: Read current staking/yield rate from core contract
